changes.summary: Added getDefaultSettings, getStandardCurrencyNames, getGlobalCommunitySeedDocument, getPriorityHubTypeTags, and migration-only legacy *Rules derivations from permission/merit/voting defaults.

Replaced inline stale default functions with NestJS app context + CommunityDefaultsService; also compares/removes stored meritSettings, votingSettings, and permissionRules when they match service defaults.
Bootstraps MeriterModule; missing commentMode backfill uses CommunityDefaultsService.getDefaultSettings().commentMode instead of hardcoded 'all'.
Bootstraps MeriterModule; 'not-own' migration target uses getDefaultVotingSettings().votingRestriction instead of hardcoded 'any'.
Bootstraps MeriterModule; global community seed and priority typeTags/currency come from CommunityDefaultsService instead of inline Mongo defaults.
Replaced raw MongoClient + insertOne with NestJS app context; uses CommunityService, PublicationService.createFutureVisionPost (postCost=0 system action).
Replaced raw MongoClient with NestJS app context and Publication mongoose model (no stale schema defaults).
Replaced raw MongoClient with NestJS app context; marathon-of-good lookup via CommunityService.getCommunityByTypeTag.
Replaced raw MongoClient with NestJS app context and Publication mongoose model.
Documented that community defaults are resolved by CommunityDefaultsService at runtime.

verification.tsc_changed_files: no errors on community-defaults.service.ts and api/scripts/*

notes: All write_set migrate-* scripts and create-ob-posts.ts now bootstrap MeriterModule. CommunityDefaultsService centralizes settings, global seed, and legacy-rules comparison shapes; create-ob-posts uses PublicationService for OB post creation.
